data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: All user data is encrypted both at rest and in transit to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 for data at rest, TLS 1.2/1.3 for data in transit.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring an additional authentication step.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS, email, and app-based authentication methods.

data.title: Fraud Detection Algorithms
data.description: AI-driven mechanisms to detect and prevent fraudulent activities.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models trained with behavioral analytics.

data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: Automatic and manual review systems to prevent harmful content dissemination.
data.technical_spec: Combination of AI detection tools and human moderators.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security assessments and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Conducted by internal teams and third-party security experts.
